Date: 2026-05-13
Time: 12-12-21
Subject: 2026 - 27 Show Tickets Availability
 
2026 & 2027 Entertainment Shows Tickets Available
 
Saturday, December 5, 2026, 8:00 pm
Tickets on sale now*
Friday, May 1 at 8:00 am via ThunderTix
$45.00 plus $2.93 (Sales Tax)
Buy Jayne Curry Tickets
*Just 42 seats available
Non-residents can purchase tickets for all four shows.
Bring friends, family
2027 Artists
The Bronx Wanderers
Friday, January 22, 2027 8:00 pm
SOLD OUT!!!
Join The Wait List
 
 
Abbacadabra
The Ultimate ABBA Tribute
Saturday, February 6, 2027,
8:00 pm
Tickets on sale now*
Buy Abbacadabra Tickets
*Just 24 seats available
The Ladies of the 70’s
Saturday, February 20, 2027 8:00 pm
Tickets on sale now*
Buy Ladies of the 70's Tickets
*Just 39 seats available
 
The Caribbean Chillers
Jimmy Buffet Tribute
Saturday, March 6, 2027
8:00 pm
Tickets on sale now*(Shorts are allowed on this “Tropical” Show)
Buy The Caribbean Chillers Tickets
*Just 37 seats available
For questions or support, contact avalonestates.entertainment@gmail.com
Andy Talbert at (301) 741-7315, or Stu Auerbach at (516) 732-4989
 
Avalon Estates would like to thank Stephanie Schwartz for providing post show desserts and the printing of brochures and lobby posters.

subject: Valencia Falls Pool Closure – Friday, May 15
from: "Kristine Russo Diaz (Replies Not Accepted) (Replies Not Accepted)" <noreply@avalon-estates.com>
html:
From: "Kristine Russo Diaz (Replies Not Accepted) (Replies Not Accepted)"
Date: 2026-05-13
Time: 12-13-18
Subject: Valencia Falls Pool Closure – Friday, May 15
Good afternoon everyone,
 
Please note that the pool amenities at Valencia Falls will be temporarily closed on Friday, May 15th for chemical cleaning and leak detection.
 
The following areas will be closed:
Pool
Pre-Function Patio
Café Patio
Bocce Courts
 
We will provide an update once Valencia Falls notifies us that the areas have reopened and are safe for use again.
 
Thank you for your understanding.
 
Sincerely,
Kristine Diaz, LCAM 
Community Association Manager
Avalon Estates

subject: Clubhouse Internet and Phone Outages
html:
From: "Kristine Russo Diaz (Replies Not Accepted)"
Date: 2026-05-13
Time: 13-01-34
Subject: Clubhouse Internet and Phone Outages
Dear Homeowners,
 
We have been experiencing internet and phone outages at the clubhouse and gate house today. Please note that while services are currently back up and running, intermittent outages may continue throughout the day as the issue is being addressed.
 
We appreciate your patience and understanding while service providers work to stabilize the connection. We will continue to monitor the situation and provide updates if needed.
 
Thank you,
Kristine Diaz, LCAM
Community Association Manager
Avalon Estates

subject: Acoustic Jam Session - Sunday, May 24th from 2 to 4 pm - Avalon Music And Drum Circle Club
html:
From: "Craig Goodwin (Replies Not Accepted)"
Date: 2026-05-14
Time: 20-49-05
Subject: Acoustic Jam Session - Sunday, May 24th from 2 to 4 pm - Avalon Music And Drum Circle Club
Avalon Music And Drum Circle Club is having an  "Acoustic Jam Session"
 
Date: Sunday, May 24th
Time From 2 till 4 PM
Location: In The Ballroom
 
It will be a Circle Format.
 
Participants are encouraged to bring their own acoustic instruments: 
Spoons, Ukulele, Guitar, Hand Drums, etc.
 
No Amplifiers and No plug-ins.
 
Of Course this is a Free Event, and some refreshments will be served
 
For more info call Craig Goodwin at 954-600-2510 
or email him at musicanddrumcircle@aol.com

subject: Clubhouse Water Shut Off Notice 05/18/2026
html:
From: "Kristine Russo Diaz (Replies Not Accepted)"
Date: 2026-05-18
Time: 09-17-50
Subject: Clubhouse Water Shut Off Notice 05/18/2026
Dear Homeowners,
 
Please be advised that the clubhouse water will be shut off for several hours while repairs are being completed. During this time, there will be no restroom facilities available at the clubhouse until further notice. We anticipate it being back up by 12pm, but that is still to be determined. 
 
We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your patience and understanding as we work to complete these necessary repairs.
 
We will continue to keep you updated regarding the status of the repairs and when the restrooms will be back in service.
 
Thank you,
Kristine Diaz, LCAM
Community Association Manager
Avalon Estates

subject: In Loving Memory of James Cantore
html:
From: "Kristine Russo Diaz (Replies Not Accepted)"
Date: 2026-05-18
Time: 12-10-51
Subject: In Loving Memory of James Cantore
Dear Homeowners,
 
It is with great sadness that we share the passing of one of our beloved residents, James Cantore.
 
James was a valued member of our Avalon community, and he will be remembered fondly by many neighbors and friends whose lives he touched over the years. During this difficult time, we extend our heartfelt condolences to his family, friends, and all who knew him.
 
Please keep the Cantore family in your thoughts and prayers.
 
Sincerely,
Kristine Diaz, LCAM
Community Association Manager
Avalon Estates

Eternal Light Memorial Gardens
11520 State Road 7
Boynton Beach, 33473

subject: Memorial Day
html:
From: "Kristine Russo Diaz (Replies Not Accepted)"
Date: 2026-05-22
Time: 13-28-42
Subject: Memorial Day
Dear Homeowners,
 
As we observe Memorial Day, we pause to honor and remember the brave men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice while serving our country. Their courage, dedication, and selflessness will never be forgotten.
 
We hope you and your families enjoy a safe and meaningful holiday weekend surrounded by loved ones and community.
 
On behalf of the Board of Directors and management, thank you to all who have served and continue to serve our nation.
 
Warm regards,
Kristine Diaz, LCAM
Community Association Manager
Avalon Estates 
 
If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you may unsubscribe at any time.
